title: Branded By Fire
description: After a brutal divorce, Carol Smoke quits her job as a Macy’s buyer to take on a new challenge. The flames of determination have been stoked. Reese Witherspoon as you’ve never seen her before—with brown hair!
quote: But then a sudden spark… I stepped up out of the dark.
altHero: Reese as Carol Smoke in the middle of a forest fire
alt1: judge at Regular City divorce court
alt2: hand ripping off an ad that says “smoke jumpers wanted”
alt3: Carol and her team landing in the middle of a burning forest
alt4: Carol carrying another smoke jumper away from the fire
